commit.message: fix: correct handling of files to modify/create during analysis
feat: add --verbose and --usage flags for logging

feat!: rework file modifications engine

from now on, nefi uses new file-modifier engine
that enables it to:

- scan and modify larger codebases (not only next-enterprise)
- modify particular files with granular attention (previously all at once)
- create comprehensive codebase analysis from aggregated calls
feat: improve start message and binary metadata

chore(release): 1.2.0 [skip ci]

readme_html:
https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c3365f73-51b0-4798-9a3b-4cbe90596ca7

nefi /ˈnɛfi/ is an AI agent that automates code management and feature integration in Next.js codebases (primarily next-enterprise repository) through natural language commands, handling everything from git operations to package management and file modification.

Learn more in our documentation (nefi.ai)

Motivation

The whole idea behind this tool is to reduce the amount of manual work and time spent on common tasks like setting up the next-enterprise boilerplate for your personal needs. It is common that not every application requires e.g. storybook integration (althought we love it!). nefi allows you to just type remove storybook from my project and it will be done.

License

The MIT License
